A City That Never Existed Licensing Proposal — 2026
Yoshihisa Sakamoto — Tokyo

A City That Never
Existed

A structured visual IP built from Tokyo's residual matter. Not photography. Not décor. The generation of a place that cannot be visited — only inhabited.

01 — Concept

Two series.
One impossible city.

Every city produces residue — light that doesn't belong, surfaces that outlast their purpose, reactions that occur without witnesses. TOKYO IP extracts these moments and reconstitutes them as a coherent visual system.

This is intellectual property, not decoration. The works do not illustrate Tokyo. They generate a Tokyo that never existed — available exclusively through licensed deployment.

Series I — Ghost

Residual Tokyo

What the city leaves behind after attention has moved on. Threshold, passage, sediment, periphery — five works tracing the archaeology of an ordinary moment.

Series II — Chemical

Synthetic Tokyo

The city as reaction: severance, precipitation, saturation, cooling — five works mapping the physics of urban intensity at the moment it exceeds itself.

03 — Licensing Model

Three layers.
One continuous relationship.

TOKYO IP does not sell images. It licenses a world — deployed across space, sustained over time, calibrated to the specific character of each environment. The cost is the cost of generating a reality.

Layer 01

Concept Design

Spatial narrative development. How the series is deployed across floors, rooms, or environments. Unique to each property.

¥3,000,000 — ¥10,000,000
Layer 02

Production

Large-format output, material specification, installation coordination. Each work produced for its specific context.

¥500,000 — ¥1,500,000
per work
Layer 03

License

Annual licensing fee covering exclusive deployment rights. Renewable. Seasonal rotation available as extension.

¥1,000,000 — ¥5,000,000
per year
04 — Entry Point

One floor.
One world.
One decision.

The pilot package is designed for a single floor or thematic zone — a contained deployment that demonstrates the full scope of the IP before broader integration. No commitment to scale. Full commitment to quality.

Concept design ¥3,000,000
5 works (production) ¥2,500,000
Annual license ¥1,000,000
Total — Year 1 ¥6,500,000
05 — Contact

Let's build
something
that stays.

All inquiries regarding licensing, spatial deployment, or collaboration are handled directly. Response within 48 hours.
